challenges.title: Before and After Pseudo-Elements
challenges.description: Write two CSS rules: (1) target `h1::before` and set `content` to `'>>> '`, (2) target `h1::after` and set `content` to `' <<<'`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '::before' in css.lower(), 'Should use ::before pseudo-element'
assert '::after' in css.lower(), 'Should use ::after pseudo-element'
assert css.lower().count('content') >= 2, 'Should set content in both pseudo-elements'
assert 'h1' in css.lower(), 'Should target h1 elements'
hints: The `content` property is required for ::before and ::after to render.

challenges.title: First-Letter, First-Line, and Before
challenges.description: Write three CSS rules: (1) target `p::first-letter` and set `font-size` to `2em` and `font-weight` to `bold`, (2) target `p::first-line` and set `color` to `navy`, (3) target `.quote::before` and set `content` to a quote character like `'\201C '` (left double quote) and set `font-size` to `2em`. Assign your CSS to the variable `css`.
challenges.test_code:
assert '::first-letter' in css.lower(), 'Should use ::first-letter pseudo-element'
assert '::first-line' in css.lower(), 'Should use ::first-line pseudo-element'
assert '::before' in css.lower(), 'Should use ::before pseudo-element'
assert 'font-size' in css.lower(), 'Should set font-size'
assert 'font-weight' in css.lower(), 'Should set font-weight'
assert 'bold' in css.lower(), 'Should set font-weight to bold'
assert 'content' in css.lower(), 'Should set content on ::before'
assert 'navy' in css.lower(), 'Should set color to navy on ::first-line'
hints: ::first-letter targets only the first letter of an element; ::first-line targets the first rendered line.
For the quote character, you can use `content: '\201C ';` or simply `content: '"';`
